title: CLEO Deprecation Registry
description: Source-of-truth for legacy code paths marked @deprecated. Validated by scripts/lint-deprecations.mjs. T9795 / Saga T9787.

version.description: Registry schema version. Bump when the entry shape changes.

path.description: Single source file bearing the @deprecated TSDoc. Either `path` or `paths` MUST be set.

paths.description: Multiple source files (or globs) sharing this deprecation. Either `path` or `paths` MUST be set.

since.description: CalVer release tag where deprecation landed (e.g. v2026.5.93).

remove.description: Earliest CalVer tag that MAY remove the deprecated code.

replacement.description: Concrete migration target (CLI command, symbol, or doc URL).

note.description: Short prose explaining the supersession + ADR/task refs.
